title: [released] Item Creation Trigger for V2

posts.author: YossiT (yossi  turgeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI All,

I need to make a short script that will make all newly created items start with “150” in the numbers column instead of empty.
i understand how to mutate the number column of an item now, but i dont see any trigger for new creation, is there such a thing?

posts.author: ran-monday.com (Ran)
posts.cookedHtml:
we now have webhooks beta open

Webhooks open beta Announcements
Hello everyone, I am happy to announce that you can now integrate Webhooks with your monday.com account! The integration is currently open for our Beta users. Go check it out! You can use Webhooks either from our API v2 or from the integration store. If you are interested in trying it out, email our support team at support@monday.com with the subject line monday.com Webhooks integration! documentation : monday.com Webhooks
